visionStatement.create: I create visually stunning digital experiences that push the boundaries of design.
visionStatement.future: I will build a brand that bridges art, technology, and culture.
visionStatement.impact: My work empowers communities to see the world differently through bold creative expression.
visionStatement.perspective: I believe the future belongs to those who dare to imagine it first.

visionStatement.create: I create motion-driven content that captures attention and tells powerful stories.
visionStatement.future: I will become a leading voice in youth media and digital entertainment.
visionStatement.impact: My work inspires the next generation to express themselves through digital media.
visionStatement.perspective: I believe authentic storytelling is the most powerful tool in the digital age.

visionStatement.create: I create clean, functional digital products that solve real problems for real people.
visionStatement.future: I will build the tools and platforms that power the next generation of creators.
visionStatement.impact: My work makes technology accessible and intuitive for every kind of learner.
visionStatement.perspective: I believe the best designs are invisible — they just work.

startupStudios.name: MindForge Studios
startupStudios.description: MindForge is the powerhouse of diversity, identity, and social impact. Brands here are rooted in culture, representation, and personal truth.
startupStudios.visualAesthetic: Bold colors, symbolic design, cultural fusion

startupStudios.name: eMagination Studios
startupStudios.description: eMagination celebrates creativity, storytelling, and world-building. This is where art meets imagination, and fantasy meets production.

startupStudios.name: GenTech Studios
startupStudios.tagline: Invent the Future. Solve the Now.
startupStudios.description: Gentech is the engine of logic, innovation, and technical excellence. The builders, coders, and system designers who solve real problems.

startupStudios.name: Innov8 Studios
startupStudios.tagline: Explore the Unknown. Build What's Next.
startupStudios.description: Innov8 leads the charge into speculative futures, AI, immersive media, and experimental design. They dare to ask 'What if?' and build the answer.
startupStudios.visualAesthetic: Neon noir, glitchcore, cyberpunk, minimalist futurism

playerDeals.terms: Investing 500 XC in Sam's development. In return, 5% of all future task and job earnings for this season.

modifiers.name: Chrono Extend Booster
modifiers.description: Extend any task deadline by 72 hours.

modifiers.name: XC Multiplier 2
modifiers.description: Gain x2 XC on all tasks for 24 hours.

modifiers.name: Task Deviation
modifiers.description: Trigger: Lack of making efficient progress on a task.

modifiers.name: Temporal Delay
modifiers.description: Given for not completing or submitting a Checkpoint Assessment by the deadline.

modifiers.name: Echo Disruption
modifiers.description: Disrupting the class environment or not following class procedures.

modifiers.name: Incomplete Submission Tax
modifiers.description: Work not meeting rubric or quality standards.

modifiers.name: Accountability Audit
modifiers.description: Accumulated fines trigger a system review. Freeze bonuses or privileges for 1 week.

modifiers.name: Blackout Zone Fee
modifiers.description: Off-task behaviors such as using unauthorized sites or watching unauthorized videos.

modifiers.name: Communication Neglect Tax
modifiers.description: Non-responsive to team messages or ignoring feedback.

modifiers.name: Deadline Neglect Tax
modifiers.description: Missed due dates without prior notice.

modifiers.name: Delinquency Tax – Class I: Minor Breach
modifiers.description: A minor inconsistency detected in workflow or participation logs.

modifiers.name: Event Absence Tax
modifiers.description: Missing assigned event duty or production.

modifiers.name: Zero-Gravity Code Violation
modifiers.description: Bullying, disrespect, inappropriate language, or negative behavior toward peers.

modifiers.name: Delinquency Tax – Class II: Task Default
modifiers.description: Multiple incomplete submissions or repeated lapses in deliverables.

modifiers.name: Delinquency Tax – Class III: Operational Failure
modifiers.description: Major project disruption or leadership breakdown recorded.

modifiers.name: Delinquency Tax – Class IV: Major Violation
modifiers.description: Sustained non-compliance or breach of system integrity protocols.

modifiers.name: Delinquency Tax: Class V — Critical Override
modifiers.description: Severe misconduct or total breakdown of assigned responsibilities. All privileges suspended.

modifiers.name: Job Abandonment Fine
modifiers.description: Player accepted a job but failed to complete it by the deadline.

submissions.reason: Helped Jordan with their project setup
Fixed a critical bug in the class repo

jobs.title: Class Social Media Manager
jobs.description: Manage the class Instagram and TikTok accounts for 2 weeks. Post 3x per week with approved content.

jobs.title: Equipment Room Assistant
jobs.description: Help manage and organize the equipment room. Check in/out cameras and audio gear for classmates.

jobs.title: Peer Tutor — Adobe Creative Suite
jobs.description: Help fellow players with Photoshop, Illustrator, and Premiere Pro. Must have Level 10+.

coins.name: Battle Arena Champion
coins.description: Awarded to Players or Teams who win a Battle Arena event within PFLX.

coins.name: Self Directed Player
coins.description: Independently completing a complex task using the 'First Line of Defense' without support.

coins.name: Strategic Organizer
coins.description: Awarded for organizing tasks, tools, or objectives to complete work efficiently.

coins.name: Entrepreneurial Spirit
coins.description: Demonstrating initiative, problem solving, and risk-taking within PFLX activities.

coins.name: Self Advocate
coins.description: Awarded for confidently expressing needs, asking for help, and taking ownership of personal growth.

coins.name: Focus Optimizer
coins.description: Awarded for staying focused and minimizing distractions during learning activities.

coins.name: Gamification Guru
coins.description: Using/boosting the PFLX Platform by ideating new functions and concepts for the gamification of PFLX.

coins.name: Professional Communicator
coins.description: Clear, kind, effective speaking or writing within a professional situation.

coins.name: Critical Thinker
coins.description: Asking strong questions or proposing thoughtful solutions.

coins.name: Master Collaborator
coins.description: Positive teamwork and inclusive collaboration.

coins.name: Innovative Creator
coins.description: Generating creative ideas or unique contributions.

coins.name: Digital Tool Master
coins.description: Effectively using required apps or tools independently.

coins.name: Resilient Learner
coins.description: Actively pushing through challenges to engage in learning.

coins.name: Growth Mindset
coins.description: Demonstrating perseverance when challenges arise.

coins.name: Goal Setter
coins.description: Setting and sharing daily/weekly goals with clear intent.

coins.name: Time Manager
coins.description: Completing tasks on time.

coins.name: Peer Supporter
coins.description: Helping a classmate understand a concept or catch up.

coins.name: Positive Participant
coins.description: Consistent participation in class activities and discussions.

coins.name: Digital Citizen
coins.description: Using devices responsibly, showing online etiquette.

coins.name: Emerging Leader
coins.description: A Common Coin given for taking initiative, guiding peers, or contributing positively to group dynamics.

coins.name: Beacon of Knowledge
coins.description: A Rare Coin for demonstrating deep understanding worth 1,000 XC.

coins.name: Beacon of Creativity
coins.description: A Rare Coin for original and innovative thinking.

coins.name: Beacon of X-Cellence
coins.description: A Rare Coin for delivering high-quality work.

coins.name: Beacon of Collaboration
coins.description: A Rare Coin given for outstanding teamwork worth 500 XC.

coins.name: Executive Producer
coins.description: Oversees full project lifecycle, budget management, and team hiring.

coins.name: Creative Director
coins.description: Leads creative vision, storytelling, and visual branding across stages.

coins.name: Director of Photography
coins.description: Manages camera work, shot composition, and lighting quality.

coins.name: Project Manager
coins.description: Tracks workflow, timelines, logistics, and team task management.

coins.name: Lead Editor
coins.description: Oversees post-production workflow and editing team management.

coins.name: Technical Director
coins.description: Manages live event technical execution (audio, staging, lighting).

coins.name: Stage Manager
coins.description: Oversees stage transitions and set management during events.

coins.name: Video Editor
coins.description: Producing and editing high-quality video content for media campaigns.

coins.name: Studio Director
coins.description: Directs talent during filming, ensuring timing and energy.

coins.name: Lighting Technician
coins.description: Operates and manages lighting during productions.

coins.name: Host/Anchor/Actor
coins.description: Role as a host, anchor, actor, or voiceover talent.

coins.name: Camera Operator
coins.description: Operated a Camera device to capture production footage.

coins.name: Global Digital Intern (Level 1)
coins.description: Completed the Global Digital Intern Program.

coins.name: Portfolio Starter
coins.description: Began developing Portfolio

coins.name: Personal Branding (Level 1)
coins.description: Completed Project: Brand Identity. In this project, I've successfully developed a personal brand, style, slogan, and vision statement.

coins.name: PFLX User Certification
coins.description: Completed the Onboarding Process to gain access to the internship management portal.

checkpoints.name: Q1 Design Sprint
checkpoints.description: Core design fundamentals — logos, prototypes, and visual identity.

checkpoints.name: Content Creator Sprint
checkpoints.description: Storytelling, reels, blog writing, and social media strategy.

checkpoints.name: Orientation Round
checkpoints.description: Intro tasks to get players set up with tools and profiles.

projects.title: Brand Identity Campaign
projects.description: Full brand identity package: logo, style guide, and social media launch assets.

projects.title: Content Sprint S1
projects.description: 60-second reels, blog posts, and social presence across platforms.

tasks.title: Design a Logo for Class Brand
tasks.description: Create a professional logo for the PFLX Digital Design class brand. Submit as a PNG file with transparent background.

tasks.title: Create a 60-Second Reel
tasks.description: Produce a 60-second social media reel showcasing your pathway project. Must include music, transitions, and captions.

tasks.title: Complete Adobe Illustrator Quiz
tasks.description: Take the Adobe Illustrator fundamentals quiz on Canvas and score 80% or higher.

tasks.title: Build a Figma Prototype
tasks.description: Design and prototype a mobile app concept using Figma. Minimum 5 screens with working interactions.

tasks.title: Write a Blog Post
tasks.description: Write a 500-word blog post about your creative process this semester. Post on the class blog.
